nasb.text: The name of Amram’s wife was Jochebed, the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt; and she bore to Amram: Aaron and Moses and their sister Miriam.

esv.text: The name of Amram’s wife was Jochebed the daughter of Levi, who was born to Levi in Egypt. And she bore to Amram Aaron and Moses and Miriam their sister.

cnv.text: 暗蘭的妻子，名叫約基別，是利未的女兒，是利未在埃及所生的；她給暗蘭生了亞倫、摩西和他們的姊姊米利暗。

ccb.text: 暗兰的妻子叫约基别，是利未女子，出生在埃及。她给暗兰生了亚伦、摩西和他们的姐姐米利暗。
